steps.expected: All benchmark scenarios pass parity check
steps.observed: All 10 scenarios PASS parity. Times: Simple String 0.610s, Case-Insensitive 0.637s, Regex 0.655s, Invert 1.346s, Count 0.099s, Context Lines 2.149s, Max Count 0.243s, File Glob 0.661s, Word Boundary 0.649s, Fixed Strings 0.661s
Both scenarios complete. repeated_fixed_string: 0.4969s->0.0060s (98.8% speedup on repeat). repeated_regex_prefilter: 0.5383s->0.1661s (69.2% speedup on repeat).
No benchmark regressions detected. (Initial run had transient 19.56% noise on Context Lines scenario; re-run passed cleanly.)

evidence.consoleErrors: none (Rust fallback messages are expected capability-fallback, not errors)

steps.observed: Success: no issues found in 42 source files. Exit code 0.

frictions.description: Initial benchmark run showed a transient 19.56% regression on 'Context Lines (Before & After)' scenario due to machine load noise. Re-run eliminated the false positive.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran benchmarks; second run passed regression check cleanly with 2.149s vs baseline 2.054s (within tolerance).

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-CROSS-002 confirmed all local gates (ruff, mypy, pytest) pass with zero errors. VAL-CROSS-001 confirmed benchmark governance intact with all 10 cold-search scenarios at parity and hot-query caching working correctly, with zero regressions detected.
